mapper.select: WITH CNTR AS ( SELECT A.CONTRACT_NUM , A.USER_SSN , D.CUSTOMER_LINK_NAME , A.SUBSCRIBER_NO , A.SUB_STATUS , A.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE , A.ICC_ID , A.LGL_AGNT_SSN , ( -- 기변이력이 2건 이상인 경우 처리를 위하여 MAX 사용 SELECT MAX(ENGG_INFO) FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT MAX(DECODE(X.GRNT_INSR_MNGM_NO, 'none', SUBSTR(X.APP_START_DD, 1, 8), SUBSTR(X.GRNT_INSR_MNGM_NO, 1, 8)) || NVL(X.ENGG_MNTH_CNT, '0')) OVER (PARTITION BY X.CONTRACT_NUM) AS ENGG_INFO FROM MSP_JUO_ADD_INFO X , MSP_DVC_CHG_AGNT_HST Y WHERE X.CONTRACT_NUM = (SELECT MAX(CONTRACT_NUM) FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO WHERE SUBSCRIBER_NO = #{subscriberNo} AND PPPO = 'PO' AND SUB_STATUS <> 'C') AND X.MODEL_CHN_CD = '01' AND X.CONTRACT_NUM = Y.CONTRACT_NUM AND X.EVNT_TRTM_NO = Y.EVNT_TRTM_NO AND Y.APPL_END_DTTM LIKE '99991231%' AND Y.EVNT_CD = 'C07' UNION -- 심플할인 -- SIM_START_DT 최대 값을 구하고 -- SIM_START_DT 최대 값에 대한 약정 개월... SELECT SUBSTR(X.SIM_START_DT, 1, 8) || X.ENGG_MNTH_CNT FROM MSP_JUO_ADD_INFO X WHERE X.CONTRACT_NUM = (SELECT MAX(CONTRACT_NUM) FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO WHERE SUBSCRIBER_NO = #{subscriberNo} AND PPPO = 'PO' AND SUB_STATUS <> 'C') AND X.EVNT_CD = 'SIM' AND X.GRNT_INSR_STAT_CD = 'A' AND X.APP_END_DATE LIKE '99991231%' AND X.SIM_START_DT = ( SELECT MAX(X2.SIM_START_DT) FROM MSP_JUO_ADD_INFO X2 WHERE X2.CONTRACT_NUM = (SELECT MAX(CONTRACT_NUM) FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO WHERE SUBSCRIBER_NO = #{subscriberNo} AND PPPO = 'PO' AND SUB_STATUS <> 'C') AND X2.EVNT_CD = 'SIM' AND X2.GRNT_INSR_STAT_CD = 'A' AND X2.APP_END_DATE LIKE '99991231%' GROUP BY X2.CONTRACT_NUM ) UNION -- 기변개발전 우수기변 대상 SELECT DECODE(X.GRNT_INSR_MNGM_NO, 'none', MIN(SUBSTR(X.APP_START_DD, 1, 8)), SUBSTR(X.GRNT_INSR_MNGM_NO, 1, 8)) || MAX(X.ENGG_MNTH_CNT) FROM MSP_JUO_ADD_INFO X WHERE X.CONTRACT_NUM = (SELECT MAX(CONTRACT_NUM) FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO WHERE SUBSCRIBER_NO = #{subscriberNo} AND PPPO = 'PO' AND SUB_STATUS <> 'C') AND X.EVNT_CD IN ('UPD','UAD') AND X.MODEL_CHN_CD = '01' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM MSP_DVC_CHG_AGNT_HST WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = X.CONTRACT_NUM AND APPL_END_DTTM LIKE '99991231%' ) GROUP BY X.GRNT_INSR_MNGM_NO, X.CONTRACT_NUM UNION -- 일반적인 경우 SELECT DISTINCT X.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE || NVL(Y.ENGG_MNTH_CNT, '0') FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO X , MSP_JUO_ADD_INFO Y WHERE X.CONTRACT_NUM = (SELECT MAX(CONTRACT_NUM) FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO WHERE SUBSCRIBER_NO = #{subscriberNo} AND PPPO = 'PO' AND SUB_STATUS <> 'C') AND X.CONTRACT_NUM = Y.CONTRACT_NUM AND Y.MODEL_CHN_CD <> '01' AND Y.ENGG_MNTH_CNT IS NOT NULL AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM MSP_JUO_ADD_INFO WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = Y.CONTRACT_NUM AND EVNT_CD = 'SIM' AND GRNT_INSR_STAT_CD = 'A' AND APP_END_DATE LIKE '99991231%' ) AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM MSP_JUO_ADD_INFO WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = Y.CONTRACT_NUM AND EVNT_CD IN ('UPD', 'UAD') AND MODEL_CHN_CD = '01' ) AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM MSP_DVC_CHG_AGNT_HST WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = X.CONTRACT_NUM AND APPL_END_DTTM LIKE '99991231%' ) ) ) AS ENGG_INFO , DECODE(B.CONTRACT_NUM, NULL, 'N', 'Y') AS HIST_YN , DECODE(B.CONTRACT_NUM, NULL, '', SUBSTR(MAX(B.APPL_STRT_DTTM) OVER(PARTITION BY B.APPL_STRT_DTTM), 1, 8)) AS DVC_CHG_DT , C.ENGG_MNTH_CNT AS DVC_ENGG_MNTH_CNT FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO A , MSP_DVC_CHG_AGNT_HST B , MSP_JUO_ADD_INFO C , MSP_JUO_CUS_INFO D WHERE A.SUB_STATUS <> 'C' AND A.PPPO = 'PO' AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = B.CONTRACT_NUM(+) AND B.REQUEST_KEY(+) IS NOT NULL AND ( B.APPL_END_DTTM(+) LIKE '99991231%' OR TO_DATE(SUBSTR(B.APPL_END_DTTM(+), 1, 8), 'YYYYMMDD') - TO_DATE(SUBSTR(B.APPL_STRT_DTTM(+), 1, 8), 'YYYYMMDD') >= 15 ) AND B.CONTRACT_NUM = C.CONTRACT_NUM(+) AND B.EVNT_TRTM_NO = C.EVNT_TRTM_NO(+) AND A.CUSTOMER_ID = D.CUSTOMER_ID AND REPLACE(D.CUSTOMER_LINK_NAME,' ') = UPPER(TRIM(#{customerLinkName})) AND A.SUBSCRIBER_NO = #{subscriberNo} ORDER BY B.APPL_STRT_DTTM DESC ) SELECT A.CONTRACT_NUM CONTRACT_NUM -- 가입계약번호 , A.USER_SSN CUSTOMER_SSN -- 주민등록번호 , A.CUSTOMER_LINK_NAME CUSTOMER_LINK_NAME -- 고객이름 , A.SUBSCRIBER_NO SUBSCRIBER_NO -- 전화번호_이전CTN , A.LGL_AGNT_SSN , CASE WHEN A.HIST_YN = 'Y' AND SYSDATE - TO_DATE(A.DVC_CHG_DT, 'YYYYMMDD') < 15 THEN 'N' WHEN ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(SUBSTR(A.ENGG_INFO,1,8), 'YYYYMMDD'), TO_NUMBER(NVL(SUBSTR(A.ENGG_INFO, 9,2), 0))) - SYSDATE > TO_NUMBER(B.CD_VAL) THEN 'E' ELSE 'Y' END AS DVC_CHG_YN FROM CNTR A , CMN_GRP_CD_MST B WHERE B.GRP_ID = 'RCP0028' AND B.ETC1 = '10' AND ROWNUM = 1
